Legal information

Privacy Policy

This page explains what data may be handled through normal site usage.

Analytics

The site may use analytics tools to understand visits, pages viewed, and general content performance.

Contact

If you contact the site by email, the information you send is used only for that communication.

No user accounts

The current site does not provide public user accounts, subscriptions, or checkout forms.

Chinese Surname Guide

This site explains Chinese surnames, common romanizations, meanings, and origins for educational reference. It is not a genealogy verification service.
